AgentSnitch
quiet
No sensitive context has left this machine.
Live activity
⏸ Paused — sensing halted. Agent activity during the pause is not being observed or recorded. Click Live to resume.
No events yet. Tool calls and network flows from running Claude Code agents will stream in here once hooks are installed — run Claude Code normally to see them.
All local • session in memory
Settings
Interface
Simple

Simple keeps the main window focused on agents, evidence, and unexpected destinations. Advanced adds raw sub-filters, Volume/List flow modes, zoom, and quiet/clear controls.

Simple mode hides diagnostic controls. Flow Trace stays on Destinations, Raw stays on All, and quiet/clear actions stay out of the way.

Advanced controls enabled
Diagnostics visible

Raw sub-filters, Flow Trace Volume/List modes, Sankey zoom, destination quieting, raw reason toggles, and clear-session controls are visible.

High Assurance mode
Loading

Requests stronger OS-backed network attribution for this session. User Visibility remains the default unless the startup default checkbox is selected.

This may ask macOS for additional approval. AgentSnitch still labels DNS, PTR, and service classification separately.

Make High Assurance the startup default
Off

When unchecked, AgentSnitch always starts in User Visibility mode even if High Assurance was enabled during the previous session.

Claude Code
Checking

AgentSnitch never installs Claude Code hooks automatically during app install. Choose the hooks you want and install them explicitly.

Checking
Keep hooks up to date
Off

When enabled, AgentSnitch updates its Claude Code hooks on app startup if the expected hook commands changed.

Installed hooks
Loading
